mapper.select: SELECT R.REPLY_NO, R.BOARD_NO, R.REPLY_CONTENT, R.REPLY_WRITER, R.CREATE_DATE, M.MEM_NAME FROM REPLY R JOIN MEMBER M ON (R.REPLY_WRITER = M.MEM_NO) WHERE R.STATUS = 'Y' AND R.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} ORDER BY R.REPLY_NO DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPLY( REPLY_NO, BOARD_NO, REPLY_CONTENT, REPLY_WRITER ) VALUES( SEQ_REPLY.NEXTVAL, #{boardNo}, #{replyContent}, #{replyWriter} )
